reasoning: The control SC-7(27) focuses on boundary protection, which in Kubernetes can be addressed through network policies and service configurations. NetworkPolicies can ensure that ingress and egress traffic is restricted, preventing unauthorized access. Additionally, avoiding NodePort services and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress controllers helps protect the boundary of the cluster. These measures align with the control's intent to protect unclassified non-national security system connections.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | unclassified non - national security system connections pr
